title: Sing Me a Love Song
writer: Sig Herzig, Jerry Wald, Harry Sauber
actors: James Melton, Patricia Ellis, Hugh Herbert
plot: "Sing Me a Love Song" is a 1936 American musical film directed by Ray Enright and written by Sig Herzig and Jerry Wald. The film stars James Melton, Patricia Ellis, Hugh Herbert, ZaSu Pitts, Allen Jenkins and Nat Pendleton. The fi...
